'''fashono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccory|hiccory]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccory|hiccory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fashono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæsheneth|fæsheneth]] || [[word:fæshenej|fæshenej]] || [[word:fæshenesh|fæshenesh]] || [[word:fæshene|fæshene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashoshonoth|fashoshonoth]] || [[word:fashoshonoj|fashoshonoj]] || [[word:fashoshonosh|fashoshonosh]] || [[word:fashoshono|fashoshono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashonoth|fashonoth]] || [[word:fashonoj|fashonoj]] || [[word:fashonosh|fashonosh]] || [[word:fashono|fashono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashofnoth|fashofnoth]] || [[word:fashofnoj|fashofnoj]] || [[word:fashofnosh|fashofnosh]] || [[word:fashofnof|fashofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashonotho|fashonotho]] || [[word:fashonojo|fashonojo]] || [[word:fashonosho|fashonosho]] || [[word:fashonoko|fashonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashonoth|fashonoth]] || [[word:fashonoj|fashonoj]] || [[word:fashonosh|fashonosh]] || [[word:fashono|fashono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashonothol|fashonothol]] || [[word:fashonojol|fashonojol]] || [[word:fashonoshol|fashonoshol]] || [[word:fashonokol|fashonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashonothotho|fashonothotho]] || [[word:fashonojojo|fashonojojo]] || [[word:fashonoshosho|fashonoshosho]] || [[word:fashonoko|fashonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashonothon|fashonothon]] || [[word:fashonojon|fashonojon]] || [[word:fashonoshon|fashonoshon]] || [[word:fashonokon|fashonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashonothoro|fashonothoro]] || [[word:fashonojoro|fashonojoro]] || [[word:fashonoshoro|fashonoshoro]] || [[word:fashonokoro|fashonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
